title: Vir Biotechnology Inc (NASDAQ:VIR) Q4 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Vir Biotechnology beat earnings expectations with an EPS of -$0.86 versus expectations of -$1.14. Full year 2023 revenues totaled $86.2 million, down significantly from $1.62 billion in 2022, primarily due to lower collaboration revenues from sotrovimab. The company reported rapid progress in its SOLSTICE Phase 2 trial with five out of six participants had undetectable HDV RNA within 12 weeks of combination therapy with tobevibart and elebsiran. Preliminary hepatitis B data showed encouraging functional cure potential, with approximately 26% of participants achieved hepatitis B surface antigen loss at end of treatment when elebsiran was combined with pegylated interferon. The company plans to share initial immunologic proof-of-concept data for VIR-1388, an HIV T-cell vaccine candidate in the second half of 2024. CEO Marianne De Backer announced that Chief Medical Officer Phil Pang would depart at the end of March 2024. The company also terminated its GSK influenza antibody collaboration, retaining sole rights to continue advancing investigational therapies for influenza. The company projects combined R&D and SG&A expenses of $650-680 million for 2024.
